'''Theal''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="AIR" /> situated in the [[Theal system/Legends|Theal system]], a part of the [[Freestanding subsectors/Legends|freestanding subsectors]] portion of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was an inhospitable world that was [[Scout/Legends|explored]] by the [[Republic Survey Corps/Legends|Republic Survey Corps]] scout [[Barosa Warren]]. More than fifty [[Standard year/Legends|years]] later,<ref name="AIR" /> by [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> Theal was controlled by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and was considered to be one of the most dangerous planets under the Empire's jurisdiction.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Theal was mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Theal [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square J-15.<ref name="TEA" />
